Title: Relates to required training for school district officials
Summary: Provides that in each term for a trustee or voting member of a board of education of a school district or a board of cooperative educational services, elected or appointed, such trustee or member shall complete certain training and file a certificate of completion with a sworn statement of completion within the first year of such term; provides that failure to comply shall disqualify such trustee or member to serve.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to required training for school district officials
